brief_notes: Solid computational methods paper with good benchmark validation. All primary results tables are numeric with appropriate statistical tests (Wilcoxon, Friedman, Mann-Whitney). However, competitors in the 3D reconstruction benchmark are anonymized as 'Competitor 1-8' rather than named, reducing reproducibility and scholarly rigor. The Visium registration table lacks SDs for the correlation values. The multimodal alignment section is thin with only two modality pairs tested. Citations include some placeholder-style references (piqa2020package) and competitors are not identified.
